title: Bare Bones - Connected Textures
description: The largest pack with connected textures for Bare Bones
body:
# General information
This pack simply adds connecting textures for the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resourcepack. In order to work, you **must** install either [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity). Both have the same effect and there is no advantage by using either of them.

# Issues?
All issues (hopefully) will get fixed at some point, so if you find any, it will be fixed in the near future.

# Copyright?
**As long as you credit me, you can:**
- Redistribute? - Sure, it wouldn't make much sense to reupload it on Modrinth though.
- Use assets? - Won't stop you. I am not your mom
- Sell it? - **Unethical**, but sure
- Use it in Modpacks? - I would like to be a part of it!
- Use it on a Server? - Ofc.
- Modify/Maintain and redistribute it? - I am cool with that


<details>
<summary>Current supported textures</summary>

  - Glass
  - Stone
  - Grass Block
  - Dirt
  - Cobblestone
  - Netherrack
  - Basalt
  - Snow
  - Sand
  - Ores
  - Deepslate
  - Clay
  - Bricks (The Block)
  - Calcite
  - Coarse Dirt
  - Cobbled Deepslate
  - Moss Block
  - Gravel
  - Cracked Deepslate Bricks
  - Cracked Polished Blackstone Bricks
  - Cracked Deepslate Tiles
  - Cracked Nether Bricks
  - Cracked Stone Bricks
  - Crimson Nylium
  - Deepslate Bricks
  - Deepslate Tiles
  - Endstone Bricks
  - Gray Concrete Powder
  - Green Concrete Powder
  - Light Gray Concrete Powder
  - Light Blue Concrete Powder
  - Pink Concrete Powder  
...more in the future

</details>

<details>
<summary>AI Notice</summary>

I kinda feel the need to talk about AI usage in my projects. I'm against using AI in creative projects, no matter what kind of creativity lies in said project.

While I **am using AI**, for correcting grammar mistakes on this Modrinth page, I am **never using AI** in any shape or form in the projects itself or for generating any images, texts or sounds.

Or in other words:
- Fixing my bad english? -> Yes
- Doing literally anything alse? -> Never

</details>

# End of the page
The title says everything...
